global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple signup for a card service.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A vibrant solid blue background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large blue square and a circle, both outlined, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A smaller blue rectangle and circle, also outlined, slightly overlapping with the main subject.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text reading 'Secure & simple' with a smaller line below it in white, stating 'Fast signup, instant card'.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' in a simple, modern font, displayed in white at the top left corner.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button in yellow with the text 'Get offer' in bold black letters.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small white text displaying the price '€9.99' located at the bottom left.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black letters.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small white label with the text 'UGC' in the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern flat design, secure signup, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the main subject shapes behind it, the logo at the top left, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple, Fast signup, instant card, VaultRun, Get offer, €9.99, SALE, UGC
